mapper.sql: select profile_id, user_id, user_name, points_total, last_story_point_time, last_activity_point_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from hx_student_profile
mapper.select: select p.profile_id, p.user_id, p.user_name, p.points_total, p.last_story_point_time, p.last_activity_point_time, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, (select count(1) from hx_story_like l where l.user_id = p.user_id) as story_count, (select count(1) from hx_activity_participant ap where ap.user_id = p.user_id) as activity_count from hx_student_profile p where p.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT u.user_id as userId, u.dept_id as deptId, u.user_name as userName, u.nick_name as nickName, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.avatar, u.status, u.create_time as createTime, d.dept_name as deptName, IFNULL(p.points_total, 0) as pointsTotal, CASE WHEN w.openid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as wechatBound FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN hx_student_profile p ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN hx_user_wechat w ON u.user_id = w.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.del_flag = '0'
AND r.role_key = #{roleKey}
AND r.role_key = 'student'
AND (u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%') OR u.nick_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%'))
AND u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
AND u.status = #{status}
AND ( d.dept_name like concat('%', #{deptName}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_dept parent WHERE parent.dept_name like concat('%', #{deptName}, '%') AND find_in_set(parent.dept_id, d.ancestors) ) )
GROUP BY u.user_id ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
mapper.delete:
delete from hx_student_profile where profile_id in
#{profileId}
mapper.insert: insert into hx_student_profile( user_id, user_name, points_total, last_story_point_time, last_activity_point_time, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{points}, #{storyPointTime}, #{activityPointTime}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update user_name = values(user_name), points_total = points_total + #{points}, last_story_point_time = ifnull(#{storyPointTime}, last_story_point_time), last_activity_point_time = ifnull(#{activityPointTime}, last_activity_point_time), update_time = sysdate()
